content:
# CLI Reference

## Commands

### `app init`

Initialize a new project.

```bash
app init --template react
```

See [Templates Guide](./templates.md) for available templates.

### `app build`

Build the project for production.

```bash
app build --output ./build
```

Output directory defaults to `./dist`.

### `app deploy`

Deploy to the cloud.

```bash
application deploy --env production
```

Requires `APP_TOKEN` environment variable. See [Auth Setup](./authentication-setup.md).

### `app test`

Run the test suite.

```bash
app test --coverage
app tests --watch  # watch mode
```
